reference: Hi, I swallowed a piece of chicken breast. It was probably too big, and when I swallowed it, it hurt and felt like the right side of my throat contracted, which caused me to get scared. I then felt pain in my neck and in my right shoulder. It has never blocked my airway. It has been a week, and I still feel like there is something in my throat down by my collarbone. Could I have scratched something, or could it still be there? The feeling comes and goes. I also have allergies.
text: I I swallowed a piece of chicken breast. It was probably too big, and when I swallowed it, it hurt and felt like the right side of my throat contracted, which caused me to get scared. I then felt pain in my neck and in my right shoulder. It has never blocked my airway. It has been a week, and I still feel like there is something in my throat down by my collarbone. Could I have scratched something, or could it still be there? The feeling comes and goes. I also have allergies.
